# Every @unchecked Sendable or nonisolated(unsafe) site must be listed here with
# a rationale. This keeps strict-concurrency escapes visible in review.
Sources/LatticeMinerCore/ProofOfWork.swift|private struct SendableSearchArgs: @unchecked Sendable {|SHA256 midstate is copied into worker arguments and not mutated after task creation.
Tests/LatticeNodeTests/MinedSubmitAcceptanceTests.swift|private final class FailingBroker: VolumeBroker, @unchecked Sendable {|Test broker has no mutable shared state beyond protocol links and always fails local stores.
Sources/LatticeNode/RPC/RPCServer+ChainRoutes.swift|private final class RPCBufferedStorer: Storer, @unchecked Sendable {|All buffered entry mutation and reads are guarded by a Synchronization.Mutex.
Sources/LatticeNode/RPC/RPCServer.swift|private final class RPCProxyResponseCollector: NSObject, URLSessionDataDelegate, @unchecked Sendable {|Collector state is scoped to one proxied request and protects response/data/continuation mutation with NSLock.
Sources/LatticeNode/Mempool/PostStateCache.swift|public final class PostStateCache: @unchecked Sendable {|The cached frontier entry is read and written only through a Synchronization.Mutex.
Sources/LatticeNode/Sync/ParallelBlockFetcher.swift|private final class CompletedCounter: @unchecked Sendable {|The progress counter is a single UInt64 guarded by a Synchronization.Mutex.
Sources/LatticeNode/Chain/LatticeNode+Persistence.swift|private final class DiskBrokerFetcher: Fetcher, @unchecked Sendable {|Wrapper delegates to DiskBroker's async broker API and has no mutable state after initialization.
Sources/LatticeNode/Chain/LatticeNode.swift|nonisolated(unsafe) private var nextTargetByBlockCID: [String: UInt256] = [:]|All accesses are routed through cacheNextTarget/cachedNextTarget/pruneNextTargetCache under nextTargetLock.
Sources/LatticeNode/Storage/SQLiteDatabase.swift|public final class SQLiteDatabase: @unchecked Sendable {|The SQLite handle and statement cache are serialized by an internal Mutex and SQLite is opened with SQLITE_OPEN_FULLMUTEX.
Sources/LatticeNode/Storage/CompositeFetcher.swift|final class CompositeFetcher: VolumeAwareFetcher, @unchecked Sendable {|Fetcher references are immutable after initialization; calls are delegated to each fetcher's async API.
Sources/LatticeNode/Storage/IvyBroker.swift|public final class IvyBroker: @unchecked Sendable, VolumeBroker {|Wrapper stores immutable Ivy reference and delegates async network work; near/far links follow VolumeBroker composition.
Sources/LatticeNode/Network/ChildBlockProof.swift|final class _CollectingStorer: Storer, @unchecked Sendable {|Internal proof helper collects synchronously during serialization before the entries are consumed.
Sources/LatticeNode/Network/ChildBlockProof.swift|private final class _BrokerFetcher: Fetcher, @unchecked Sendable {|Wrapper has immutable broker reference and delegates through VolumeBroker's async fetch path.
Sources/LatticeNode/Storage/MempoolAwareFetcher.swift|final class MempoolAwareFetcher: VolumeAwareFetcher, @unchecked Sendable {|Inner fetcher and transaction cache are immutable after initialization; calls delegate to async fetcher APIs.
Tests/LatticeNodeTests/HeaderBatchPeerBindingTests.swift|private final class HeaderBatchBox: @unchecked Sendable {|Test capture box protects value and random-draw state with NSLock.
Tests/LatticeNodeTests/HeaderBatchPeerBindingTests.swift|private final class HeaderBatchProofBox: @unchecked Sendable {|Test capture box protects value state with NSLock.
Sources/LatticeMiningCoordinator/MiningWorkerProcess.swift|private final class MiningWorkerSubprocess: @unchecked Sendable {|Owns one Foundation.Process whose lifecycle is confined to a single search call; the cancellation handler only calls thread-safe terminate().
